title: Dashboard
welcome_popup_subtitle: Let's set up your account and start investing
welcome_popup_description: Vault Capital is your gateway to sophisticated investment management. Follow these simple steps to get started.
feature_email_alerts_desc: Receive notifications about your investments and market updates directly in your inbox.
feature_dark_mode_desc: Switch to dark mode for a comfortable viewing experience during late-night trading sessions.
feature_mobile_app_desc: Manage your portfolio on the go with our native mobile applications for iOS and Android.
feature_2fa_desc: Secure your account with two-factor authentication using authenticator apps or SMS.
feature_api_desc: Connect your custom trading bots and integrate Vault with your existing financial tools.
feature_webhooks_desc: Get real-time event notifications delivered to your external systems and applications.
feature_guide_subtitle: Explore all the features available to optimize your investing experience
